headline_seed: A major Russian attack kills 20 in Kyiv as Ukrainian strikes disrupt Moscow’s oil sector - AP News
draft_text:
Russia fired 74 missiles and 496 drones at Kyiv overnight, injuring roughly 90 people. Six floors of a nine-story residential building collapsed in the Darnytskyi district. BBC News reports 52,500 residents sheltered underground.

And that's the mews.
